calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Rosborough appeared by zoom for and with Kathleen Bruno (Petitioner/Executor) by zoom.

The court stated that it saw the supplement that was filed last Thursday, that this was put on calendar because if it had followed the initial request to set a $5,000.00 reserve, it would push this to a negative amount in the estate and noted that Counsel is now asking to have zero dollars go to the beneficiary and setting the reserve at $1,779.94. The Petition for Final Distribution and for Allowance of Statutory Compensation to Executor, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
